title: Calm At Sea.
content:
Silence deep rules o'er the waters,

    Calmly slumb'ring lies the main,
    While the sailor views with trouble

    Nought but one vast level plain.

    Not a zephyr is in motion!

    Silence fearful as the grave!
    In the mighty waste of ocean

    Sunk to rest is ev'ry wave.
meaning:
"Calm At Sea." is a quintessential example of Johann Wolfgang von Goethe's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
